ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Current version of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, retired) */,
  "last_deployed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last deployment */,
  "last_trained_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last training */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Current accuracy of the model */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the function belongs to */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the function (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last execution */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function the phase belongs to */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "phase_order" INTEGER /* Order of the phase in the function execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the phase (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last execution */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken for the phase execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phases_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that generated the output */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function that generated the output */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase that generated the output */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the output */,
  "function_output" REAL /* Output value of the function */,
  "phase_output" REAL /* Output value of the phase */,
  "has_anomaly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the output has an anomaly */,
  "anomaly_score" INTEGER /* Score of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_likelihood" REAL /* Likelihood of the anomaly */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for the output */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Detailed output data */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken for the output generation */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the output that contains the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the anomaly */,
  "detected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who detected the anomaly */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_detected_by FOREIGN KEY ("detected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES model_outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being accessed */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, run) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the report is based on */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function the report is based on */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, anomaly, summary) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the report details */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, shared, archived) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users the report was shared with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the current version of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model version */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
